headline: J&J Slipped On Its Report; Why It Bodes Well For Intuitive, Abbott, Others
summary: Johnson & Johnson stock dipped early Wednesday, though the healthcare giant beat second-quarter forecasts and raised its outlook.

headline: Netflix's Q3 Earnings Report Could Lead to $21.5 Billion Swing in Market Value
summary: Earnings focus on Thurs, Benzinga-selected slate: industrial engines, logistics real estate, streaming, medical devices. Options market offers snapshot of volatility. UnitedHealth Group Inc. (NYSE:UNH) is the marquee name. Prologis, Inc. (NYSE:PLD) reports before opening bell, GE Aerospace (NYSE:GE) reports after bell.

headline: Johnson & Johnson CFO Says This Drug Is Outperforming ‘Almost Any Launch’ in Recent Memory
summary: Johnson & Johnson’s  second-quarter earnings were met with a shrug on Wall Street, but one of the drugmaker’s top executives insists the most powerful growth drivers are just starting to pick up speed.  J&J on Wednesday reported adjusted earnings of $2.90 a share, beating the $2.85 a share analysts had anticipated.  “I think the second quarter was just an affirmation of the first quarter,” Chief Financial Officer Joe Wolk said in an interview with Barron’s. “Our pharmaceutical unit continues to thrive, surpassing $16 billion in sales for the first time ever in the company’s history.”

raw.headline: Johnson & Johnson CFO Says This Drug Is Outperforming ‘Almost Any Launch’ in Recent Memory

headline: Abbott’s cancer diagnostics vision: ‘There’s always a hunger to make these tests better’
summary: Jorge Garces, who joined Abbott to oversee scientific strategy for cancer diagnostics after it acquired Exact Sciences, discusses the future of the field.
